summary: Testing iteration 7 - POS Box Quantity bug fix, Keyboard shortcuts, and Online Shop features. All tests PASSED.

issues: Fixed overlay (z-40) intercepts clicks - requires force=True in automation tests (not user-blocking)

passed_tests: POS Box Quantity BUG FIX: Product P001 (苹果手机壳, box_quantity=12, price1=$19.50, price3=$16.50)
- Add P001 to cart in price1 mode: qty=1, unit=$19.50, amount=$19.50 ✓
- Switch to price2 mode: qty=1, unit=$17.25, amount=$17.25 ✓
- Switch to Box mode: qty=1, unit=$198.00 (12×$16.50), amount=$198.00 ✓
POS 2 Boxes: qty=2, unit=$198.00/box, amount=$396.00, detail shows (24件) ✓
POS Keyboard F1: Opens product search popup with category tabs ✓
POS Keyboard F2: Opens payment dialog (when cart has items and shift started) ✓
POS Keyboard F3: Clears cart (shows 0 商品, 0 件) ✓
Online Shop Title: 网上商店 (i18n text) ✓
Online Shop Search Bar: Has data-testid='shop-search', placeholder='搜索商品名称/编码...' ✓
Online Shop Category Tabs: 全部, 电子产品, 食品饮料, 服装鞋帽 ✓
Online Shop Category Filter: Clicking 食品饮料 shows only 2 food items (可乐500ml, 薯片大包) ✓
Online Shop Search: Searching '可乐' filters to 1 product ✓
Online Shop Products: Show price1 (not retail_price), e.g., $3.50, $9.90 ✓
Online Shop i18n: 库存 (stock), 加入购物车 (add to cart) ✓
Online Shop Cart: Add to cart works, badge shows count, cart dialog has total and checkout ✓

features_verified.pos_box_quantity_bug_fix: FIXED - calcCartItemAmount returns qty × boxQty × p3 for box mode, getItemPriceByMode returns p3 × boxQty
features_verified.online_shop_category_filter: WORKING - Category tabs filter products correctly
features_verified.online_shop_i18n: WORKING - Chinese labels: 网上商店, 全部, 库存, 加入购物车

critical_code_review_comments: POS product popup overlay (z-40) may interfere with automated testing but does not block manual user interaction
seed_data_creation: Using existing seed data: P001 (苹果手机壳) has box_quantity=12, price1=$19.50, price2=$17.25, price3=$16.50
context_for_next_testing_agent:
All 8 requested features tested and verified:
1. POS Box Quantity BUG FIX - calcCartItemAmount and getItemPriceByMode correctly calculate box prices (qty × boxQty × price3)
2. 2-box scenario verified: 2 boxes = $396.00
3. POS Keyboard shortcuts working: F1=search, F2=checkout, F3=clear, ESC=close
4. Online Shop at /shop has search bar and category filter tabs
5. Category filter works (食品饮料 shows 2 food items)
6. Search filter works (可乐 returns 1 product)
7. Products show price1, i18n labels (库存, 加入购物车)
8. Cart functionality working (add, view, total, checkout button)
